generated_oml:
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST110LX LiDAR mounted on vehicle, generating 3D point clouds up to 40 Hz"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance DeepSenseDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel DeepSense D435i depth camera mounted on vehicle, providing RGB‑D frames up to 30 Hz"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthFrameTransmitted
]

    base:desc "Motor position encoder providing wheel rotation data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo angle sensor providing steering position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoPositionTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor providing speed, heading, and other telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthFrameTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DeepSenseDepthCamera
]

instance MotorPositionTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionSensor
]

instance SteeringServoPositionTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance VehicleStateTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data for clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance DepthFrameData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB‑D frames from depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthFrameTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoPositionTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data (speed, heading, etc.)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateTransmitted
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric processing model that performs point cloud clustering and tracking on LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationFEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE that serialises data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance VehicleActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuation system translating desired speed commands into voltage signals for Vedder ESC and PWM for steering servo, issued over ROS2 topics"
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware managing intra‑system communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Relational SQL database for persistent logging and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance WiFiLinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low‑latency Wi‑Fi radio link between vehicle and twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CloudComputeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud compute hosting containerised ACC service"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationFEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE serialises and aligns data messages"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Graphical UI service streaming real‑time vehicle state, projected path, and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, PathProjectionInsight, ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm offloaded execution on cloud compute, returns desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccelerateDesiredSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI service enabling operators to control ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of current vehicle state streamed in real‑time to UI"
]

instance PathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of projected driving path shown on 3D visualization panel"
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of tracked objects around vehicle displayed in UI"
]

instance AccelerateDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Desired speed command computed by ACC algorithm on DT delivered to vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to enable ACC in vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to disable ACC in vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command sent to vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin sends control commands back to the vehicle over the same Wi‑Fi/UDP link. Commands include the desired speed calculated by the off‑loaded ACC service, ACC enable/disable switches, and an emergency‑braking command. These messages are formatted by the Data Translation FE and routed through ROS 2 to the Actuation FE, which drives motor and steering actuators. The vehicle acknowledges execution via updated vehicle‑state messages, closing the feedback loop."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT requires that all participating devices maintain a shared notion of time for computation offloading. Clock synchronization must achieve an accuracy of 100 ms, which is the limit imposed by the hardware; standards for safety‑critical vehicular applications demand stricter synchronization, but the implemented system settles on the 100 ms bound. This synchronization interval defines the temporal granularity of data exchange between the Physical Twin Entity and the Digital Twin Entity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration is achieved by mapping each Functional Entity to an individual ROS 2 package; a package contains one or more ROS 2 nodes that implement the FE’s functionality. Inter‑entity communication leverages ROS 2 middleware, providing runtime coordination across the three entities deployed on distinct hardware. The design follows the ISO 23247 reference architecture, with the Physical Twin Entity exposing sensor/actuator resources, the Digital Twin Entity processing and representing them, and the User Entity offering 3‑D visualization and control panels. Resource management is implicit in the ROS 2 node lifecycle and the separate hardware allocation per entity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra‑twin software components communicate via a ROS 2 network (publish/subscribe), while inter‑entity communication between the physical twin and the digital twin uses a Wi‑Fi LAN with UDP at the transport layer. The network topology consists of a single ROS 2 domain on the DT side and a Wi‑Fi point‑to‑point link to the vehicle. No explicit bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security mechanisms are described in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The ISO 23247 framework permits the use of standard data‑exchange protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for integration with external enterprise systems, although the presented automotive DT does not explicitly instantiate such a protocol. Consequently, external integration is conceptually supported via OPC UA, but no concrete external system connection is described in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system is explicitly based on ISO 23247 (parts 1‑4), adopting its entity‑based reference architecture (Observable Manufacturing Element, Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Functional Entities). Device coordination may employ OPC Unified Architecture, and the design requires clock synchronization with an accuracy of 100 ms, satisfying safety‑critical vehicular application standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The case study notes that the ISO 23247 reference architecture does not cover safety‑critical requirements; it recommends elevating safety to a first‑class concern by adopting the automotive functional‑safety standard ISO 26262. Security aspects are identified as needing further research and alignment with existing automotive standards, but no concrete security mechanisms are described."
]
